creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
I updated and tarred a generic cross development environment. The 
objective was to build UNIX targets only, but this came by. I don't use
32 bit DOS so it´s untested but many people have tested it.

Fix: 

May also be good to include the DOS DPMI, on the CD under "utils" 
(or tools ?).
How-To-Repeat: crossgo32.tar.gz, required to locally mirror the crosstree-1.2p1 
tarball. Both are in ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming
